text: Surrounded by stark, skewed architecture and the quiet tension of emergency equipment, I sense the careful planning of human spaces—heightened by an almost clinical emptiness. Then I pass into a realm of vibrant inquiry: the R+D display immerses me in a celebration of curiosity, where innovation, machines, and the human spirit converge. I feel a subtle awe, a pull between the structured unknown and the creative potential of intellect—at once unsettled and inspired, aware of the ever-present dance between safety and discovery.
